word: H3673 - כָּנַשׁ - kânash - kaw-nash' - Gather together

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנשׁ

Transliteration: kânash

Phonetic: kaw-nash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to gather
    1. (Peal) to gather
    2. (Ithpael) gathered (participle)

Origin: corresponding to H3664

TWOT entry: 2792

Part(s) of speech: Verb
